languages.text:
Until the end of turn, passing through enemies deals double damage and pushes them 2 cells.
Receive {g|f:a7841f4596694e508c302b5ffab92753}Slowed{/g} until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text: Until the end of the user's turn, each enemy the user moves through suffers double damage and is pushed 2 cells away. At the end of their turn, the user suffers {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g}.

Until the end of the user's turn, each enemy the user moves through suffers double damage and is pushed 2 cells away. At the end of their turn, the user suffers {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g}.

Until the end of the user's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, each enemy the user moves through suffers double {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and is {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}pushed{/g} 2 cells away.
At the end of their turn, the user becomes {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g} until the end of combat.

At the end of their turn, the user becomes {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g} until the end of combat.

Until the end of the user's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, each enemy the user moves through suffers double {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and is {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}pushed{/g} 2 cells away. At the end of their turn, the user suffers a {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g}.

languages.text: До конца {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} обладателя аугмента каждый противник, через которого он проходит, получает удвоенный {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урон{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}отталкивается{/g} на 2 клетки. В конце хода обладатель аугмента {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}калечит ногу{/g}.

traits.locale_text: До конца {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} обладателя аугмента каждый противник, через которого он проходит, получает удвоенный {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урон{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}отталкивается{/g} на 2 клетки. В конце хода обладатель аугмента {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}калечит ногу{/g}.

До конца {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} обладателя аугмента каждый противник, через которого он проходит, получает удвоенный {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урон{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}отталкивается{/g} на 2 клетки. В конце хода обладатель аугмента {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}калечит ногу{/g}.

languages.text:
Hasta el final del {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g} del usuario, cada enemigo a través del cual se mueva el usuario sufre el doble de {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}daño{/g} y es {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}empujado{/g} a 2 casillas de distancia.
Al final de su turno, el usuario queda {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}ralentizado{/g} hasta el final del combate.
languages.original_text:
Until the end of the user's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, each enemy the user moves through suffers double {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and is {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}pushed{/g} 2 cells away.
At the end of their turn, the user becomes {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g} until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text:
Hasta el final del {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g} del usuario, cada enemigo a través del cual se mueva el usuario sufre el doble de {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}daño{/g} y es {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}empujado{/g} a 2 casillas de distancia.
Al final de su turno, el usuario queda {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}ralentizado{/g} hasta el final del combate.

languages.text:
Bis zum Ende des {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} des Nutzers, erleidet jeder Gegner, durch den sich der Nutzer bewegt, doppelten {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}Schaden{/g} und wird 2 Felder {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}zurückgeworfen{/g}.
Am Ende seines Zuges wird er bis zum Ende des Kampfes {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}verlangsamt{/g}.
languages.original_text:
Until the end of the user's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, each enemy the user moves through suffers double {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and is {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}pushed{/g} 2 cells away.
At the end of their turn, the user becomes {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g} until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text:
Bis zum Ende des {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} des Nutzers, erleidet jeder Gegner, durch den sich der Nutzer bewegt, doppelten {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}Schaden{/g} und wird 2 Felder {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}zurückgeworfen{/g}.
Am Ende seines Zuges wird er bis zum Ende des Kampfes {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}verlangsamt{/g}.

languages.text:
Kullanıcının {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turu{/g} sonlanana dek kullanıcının içinden ilerlediği her düşman, iki katı {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}hasara{/g} maruz kalır ve 2 hücre uzağa {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}itilir{/g}.
Kullanıcı, turu sona erdiğinde {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}yavaşlar{/g}. Bu etki, çatışma sonuna dek sürer.
languages.original_text:
Until the end of the user's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, each enemy the user moves through suffers double {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and is {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}pushed{/g} 2 cells away.
At the end of their turn, the user becomes {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g} until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text:
Kullanıcının {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turu{/g} sonlanana dek kullanıcının içinden ilerlediği her düşman, iki katı {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}hasara{/g} maruz kalır ve 2 hücre uzağa {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}itilir{/g}.
Kullanıcı, turu sona erdiğinde {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}yavaşlar{/g}. Bu etki, çatışma sonuna dek sürer.

languages.text:
Jusqu'à la fin du {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g} de l'utilisateur, tous les ennemis qu'il traverse subissent des {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} multipliés par 2 et sont {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}repoussés{/g} de 2 cases.
À la fin de son tour, l'utilisateur subit un {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}Ralentissement{/g} jusqu'à la fin du combat.
languages.original_text:
Until the end of the user's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, each enemy the user moves through suffers double {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and is {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}pushed{/g} 2 cells away.
At the end of their turn, the user becomes {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g} until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text:
Jusqu'à la fin du {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g} de l'utilisateur, tous les ennemis qu'il traverse subissent des {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} multipliés par 2 et sont {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}repoussés{/g} de 2 cases.
À la fin de son tour, l'utilisateur subit un {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}Ralentissement{/g} jusqu'à la fin du combat.

languages.text:
在使用者{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}结束前，使用者穿过的每个敌人承受双倍{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}伤害{/g}并被{g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}推开{/g}2格。
其回合结束时，使用者承受{g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}减速{/g}效果，直到战斗结束。
languages.original_text:
Until the end of the user's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, each enemy the user moves through suffers double {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and is {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}pushed{/g} 2 cells away.
At the end of their turn, the user becomes {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g} until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text:
在使用者{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}结束前，使用者穿过的每个敌人承受双倍{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}伤害{/g}并被{g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}推开{/g}2格。
其回合结束时，使用者承受{g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}减速{/g}效果，直到战斗结束。

languages.text:
使用者の{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}終了まで、使用者が通り抜けた各敵は2倍の{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}ダメージ{/g}を受け、2マス{g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}押し出される{/g}。
ターン終了時、使用者は戦闘終了まで{g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}鈍足{/g}になる。
languages.original_text:
Until the end of the user's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, each enemy the user moves through suffers double {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and is {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}pushed{/g} 2 cells away.
At the end of their turn, the user becomes {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}slowed{/g} until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text:
使用者の{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}終了まで、使用者が通り抜けた各敵は2倍の{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}ダメージ{/g}を受け、2マス{g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}押し出される{/g}。
ターン終了時、使用者は戦闘終了まで{g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}鈍足{/g}になる。
